meta.title: A Conversation with Ahmad Massoud, Leader of the National Resistance Front (NRF) of Afghanistan
meta.description: Following the latest Vienna Process for a Democratic Afghanistan meeting, Ahmad Massoud, leader of the National Resistance Front (NRF) of Afghanistan, sat down with Luke Coffey for an in-depth interview in Vienna. The discussion covered Afghanistan’s current state, the armed resistance against the Taliban, and what role the United States—particularly President Donald Trump—could play in shaping the country’s future. Massoud provided insights into the ongoing struggle, regional dynamics, and the NRF’s vision for a free and democratic Afghanistan. This conversation offers a rare glimpse into Afghanistan’s resistance movement at a crucial moment for the country and the international community.
